title: HGL DINOSAUR WATER GAME 1 STYLE
description: Product Description Water tank game with air pump control. Press the button to push the pieces around the water, attempting to hook the hoops over each peg. The design features a selection of dinosaurs posing in the background. Safety Warning Small parts chocking hazzard.
